analysis.stakeholders: Enterprise customers, IT admins, end users, operations team, compliance/legal, R&D
fitReasons: Currently building agentic AI platform at JPMC — directly aligned with RingCentral's AI product strategy and receptionist use case
Proven ability to scale platform products at enterprise level with deep regulated industry experience from JPMorgan Chase
Yahoo background demonstrates comfort with massive-scale infrastructure, ranking systems, and billions of daily transactions
Team management experience — has hired, coached, and scaled PM organizations
Technical PM foundation enables depth on complex AI/ML product decisions at intersection of conversational AI and enterprise platforms
gaps: No direct telecom/UCaaS/CCaaS background — will require immersion in cloud telephony, call routing, IVR, and voice infrastructure
Limited hands-on experience with voice AI / chatbot products compared to text-based agentic AI
Not deeply familiar with telecom-specific concepts (SIP, PSTN, call signaling) — would need ramp-up period
analysis.strategy: Position as bringing rare combination of agentic AI expertise (AI receptionist is perfect intersection) plus enterprise-scale platform experience from JPMC's regulated environment. Frame lack of direct telecom experience as advantage — fresh perspective unbound by legacy industry constraints. Lead with JPMC agentic AI work; emphasize ability to ramp on telecom domain quickly given platform PM foundation.

subtitles.jpmc: Agentic AI platform for investment banking – LLM-powered search, ranking, and workflow automation for regulated financial systems
subtitles.yahoo: Built billion-scale platform infrastructure and handled enterprise customer trust at global scale
subtitles.conversant: Mobile and conversion measurement at enterprise scale

resumeData.summary: Sr. Director of Product with 15+ years building agentic AI and enterprise platform products at scale. Currently leading agentic AI platform development at JPMorgan Chase, delivering LLM-powered search and conversational workflows with 99% top-5 accuracy serving 7,000+ investment professionals in a heavily regulated financial environment. Deep expertise in platform scaling, team leadership, and bringing AI-powered solutions to large enterprises. Previously managed $500M+ revenue streams at Yahoo, scaling ad platform infrastructure across 20B+ daily transactions while maintaining enterprise customer trust and compliance rigor. Combines hands-on agentic AI system expertise with enterprise product acumen, team scaling experience, and proven ability to navigate complex organizational landscapes.
